title: Violin Teacher
description:
Company Overview / Employee Value Proposition

LVL Music Academy is a premier destination for violin, cello, piano lessons and fine musical instruments and accessories. We take pride in our extensive collection of violins, cellos, and accessories, offering musicians and enthusiasts the finest quality products.

Job Summary

As a Violin Teacher at LVL Music Academy, you will deliver expert violin instruction and music theory education to students of diverse ages, driving their musical development and preparing them for examinations and performances.

Responsibilities

  • Deliver engaging and tailored violin instruction to students aged 3.5 years to adults, adapting teaching methods to individual learning needs
  • Develop and implement detailed lesson plans that align with students’ skill levels and progression goals
  • Teach music theory aligned with ABRSM standards and prepare students effectively for examinations
  • Organize and manage student recitals to provide performance opportunities and showcase progress
  • Collaborate with teaching staff to enhance curriculum and improve overall music program quality
  • Maintain proactive and clear communication with students and parents to support learning outcomes and engagement

Preferred competencies and qualifications

  • Minimum diploma in Music; degree preferred
  • At least 2 years of teaching experience with demonstrated success in violin instruction
  • Proficiency in teaching both practical violin skills and music theory to a broad age range
  • Ability to organize recitals and work collaboratively within a team environment
  • Passion for fostering students’ musical growth and contributing to a positive learning atmosphere

Perks and Packages

  • Base Salary: $4,100 – $5,000 per month
  • Medical and Insurance Coverage (Hospital & Surgical)
  • 14 Days Annual Leave & Sick Leave
  • In-House Learning, Development, and Training
  • Professional Career Development Opportunities
  • Complimentary Music Lessons
  • Vibrant and Supportive Company Culture
  • Opportunity to travel overseas with the team for annual performances
  • Performance incentives and continuous training opportunities

Benefits

  • Competitive salary based on experience and qualifications
  • Opportunity to work in a dynamic and supportive team environment
  • Training provided to enhance skills related to the role
  • Employee discounts on music instruments and accessories
  • Career development opportunities
  • Medical insurance coverage (hospital & surgical)
  • Performance incentives and continuous training opportunities
  • Opportunity to go overseas with the team for annual overseas performances
  • Annual leave and sick leave entitlements
  • Choice of 2 weekdays as off days

About Us

Founded in 2013, LVL Music Academy is a leading music school and instrument shop in Singapore, offering professional music lessons and high-quality instruments. We are dedicated to nurturing musical talent in a supportive and inspiring environment.

How to Apply

Please submit your resume and a cover letter outlining your interest in the role and relevant experience.
